name: Castle Entrance
description: Cold stone towers over you as the heavy gate stands ajar. The air smells of rain and iron.

name: Cobble Approach
description: Worn steps lead up from the gate. Moss fills the cracks between the stones, and you hear the wind in the parapets above.

name: Courtyard
description: An open yard of slick cobblestones. A dry fountain sits at the center, and torchlight flickers along the walls.
